title: UpdateNoteRequest
description: Payload to update an existing wiki note. Omitted optional fields leave the current value unchanged.

expectedVersion.description: The currentVersion the client last observed. Returns HTTP 409 if the note has since been updated.

title.description: New title for the note. Omit to leave unchanged.

content.description: Full Markdown content of the note.
content.example:
# Getting Started

Welcome to the wiki.

accessLevel.description: Who can read this note. Omit to leave unchanged.

status.description: Publication status. Omit to leave unchanged.

summary.description: Optional short description of the change for audit purposes.
